_meta.label: VA disability compensation — 2026 rates
_meta.co: 2.8% COLA over 2025 rates: SEED VALUES — verify against VA.gov before relying on them
_meta.note: Rates 10% and 20% do not vary by dependents. Rates 30%+ vary by dependent status. Amounts are monthly USD. 'childUnder18Add' and 'spouseAdd'-style deltas apply on top of the veteran-alone base for that rating. These figures are seeded estimates for the app and MUST be reconciled with the official VA rate tables each December.

dependentDeltas._note: Add these to the appropriate base above. Deltas apply only at 30%+ and scale roughly with rating; values shown are for the 100% column and are prorated internally by ratingFactor = ratePct/100.
